chief_complaint: A 22-year-old male developed thyroid storm and had a history of epilepsy.
history: The patient's past medical history was complicated by epilepsy, for which he took lacosamide. He developed thyroid storm necessitating therapeutic plasma exchange (TPE).
exam: No specific physical examination findings were provided.
labs: Lacosamide concentration was measured immediately before TPE (5.1 mug/mL) and 2.5 hours after the initial measurement (3.4 mug/mL).
